ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "simulation_method" TEXT /* Simulation method used (e.g., NVE, NVT, NPT) */,
  "molecular_type" TEXT /* Type of molecule being simulated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the experiment */,
  "bond_energy" REAL /* Bond energy of the frame */,
  "angle_energy" REAL /* Angle energy of the frame */,
  "dihedral_energy" REAL /* Dihedral energy of the frame */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the simulation */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the simulation */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular property */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame the property belongs to */,
  "ub_energy" REAL /* UB energy of the frame */,
  "imp_energy" REAL /* IMP energy of the frame */,
  "cmap_energy" REAL /* CMAP energy of the frame */,
  "vdwaals_energy" REAL /* VDWAALS energy of the frame */,
  "eel_energy" REAL /* EEL energy of the frame */,
  "dipole_moment" REAL /* Dipole moment of the molecule */,
  "molecular_surface" REAL /* Molecular surface area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_properties_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy component */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame the component belongs to */,
  "one_four_vdw_energy" REAL /* 1-4 VDW energy of the frame */,
  "one_four_eel_energy" REAL /* 1-4 EEL energy of the frame */,
  "egb_energy" REAL /* EGB energy of the frame */,
  "esurf_energy" REAL /* ESURF energy of the frame */,
  "gb_energy" REAL /* GB energy of the frame */,
  "pmf_energy" REAL /* PMF energy of the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_components_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_energy" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total energy value */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame the energy value belongs to */,
  "g_gas_energy" REAL /* G GAS energy of the frame */,
  "g_solvent_energy" REAL /* G SOLVENT energy of the frame */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy of the frame */,
  "potential_energy" REAL /* Potential energy of the frame */,
  "kinetic_energy" REAL /* Kinetic energy of the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_energy_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular interaction */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame the interaction belongs to */,
  "atom1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first atom involved in the interaction */,
  "atom2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second atom involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., hydrogen bond, ionic interaction) */,
  "interaction_energy" REAL /* Energy of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_interactions_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atoms" (
  "atom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atom */,
  "atom_name" TEXT /* Name of the atom */,
  "atom_type" TEXT /* Type of the atom (e.g., carbon, oxygen, nitrogen) */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge of the atom */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the atom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atom_id")
)
